---

## Goal
Describe the user behavior that must be validated end-to-end.

## Business Behavior (Gherkin)
```gherkin
Feature:
  As a
  I want
  So that

  Scenario:
    Given
    When
    Then
```

## Scope
- In scope:
- Out of scope:

## Environments
- Local URL:
- CI URL:
- Test data requirements:

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Feature file(s) added or updated
- [ ] Step definitions implemented
- [ ] Scenario passes locally
- [ ] Scenario runs in CI
- [ ] Report artifact generated

## Definition of Done
- [ ] No flaky behavior across at least 3 repeated runs
- [ ] Failing scenario messages are actionable
- [ ] Documentation updated
